name: gerrit-push-se
description: Adds a Source Control button to push HEAD to Gerrit refs/for/<branch> for review.

gerritPush.defaultBranch.description: Default branch to push to refs/for/<branch>. Leave empty to use the current branch.

gerritPush.remote.description: Git remote name to push to.

gerritPush.confirmBeforePush.description: Show a confirmation dialog before pushing to Gerrit.

gerritPush.confirmationStyle.description: Style of confirmation dialog: 'quickpick' for VS Code quick pick, 'message' for message box.

gerritPush.enableReviewers.description: Enable reviewer selection before pushing to Gerrit.

gerritPush.compactRemoteUrl.description: Show only repository name instead of full remote URL in confirmation dialog.

gerritPush.skipAllPrompts.description: Skip all prompts and use defaults: remote is 'origin', branch is current branch.

gerritPush.reviewerPresets.description: Preset reviewers shown in the reviewer picker.

gerritPush.quickPush.description: Enable quick push: add all files, commit messages from input box.

gerritPush.autoAddChangeId.description: Enable auto add Change-Id to commit message.
